name: LLamasoft (Coupa) Supply Chain Design API
what_it_does: LLamasoft Supply Chain Guru (now Coupa Supply Chain Design) REST API for supply chain network design, optimization, and risk modeling. Enables AI agents to manage supply chain network design and facility location optimization for distribution network planning, handle transportation cost and flow optimization for logistics network efficiency, access risk scenario modeling and supply chain disruption simulation for resilience planning, retrieve inventory policy optimization across distribution network for multi-echelon planning, manage cost-to-serve analysis and total landed cost optimization for supply chain economics, handle nearshoring and reshoring analysis for supply chain reconfiguration, access supplier network risk assessment for supply chain resilience, retrieve carbon footprint and sustainability optimization for ESG supply chain planning, manage demand variability and lead time sensitivity analysis for robust network design, and integrate LLamasoft with ERP, TMS, and supply chain execution systems.
use_cases: Designing distribution networks from supply chain strategy agents
Modeling supply chain risk from disruption planning agents
Optimizing transportation costs from logistics agents
Analyzing nearshoring from supply chain reconfiguration agents
not_for: Day-to-day operational supply chain execution without strategic design
Organizations without dedicated supply chain engineering or analytics teams
Simple single-warehouse operations without network complexity
best_when: A manufacturer, retailer, or logistics company using LLamasoft (Coupa Supply Chain Design) wants AI agents to automate supply chain network modeling, facility location optimization, risk scenario analysis, and total cost of ownership analysis.
avoid_when: STRATEGIC DECISION AUTOMATION RISK: Supply chain network design decisions (opening/closing DCs, changing supplier relationships, shifting manufacturing) have multi-year financial impact and require executive governance; automated network design recommendations must not trigger execution without strategic review and board/executive approval. Model data quality dependence — supply chain optimization models are only as good as the input data (demand patterns, transportation costs, lead times, inventory holding costs); automated optimization with inaccurate inputs creates misleading recommendations. Coupa acquisition integration — LLamasoft was acquired by Coupa in 2020; verify current API stability and product integration within the Coupa platform ecosystem before long-term investment.

auth.notes: LLamasoft (Coupa) uses OAuth 2.0 via Coupa platform. REST API with JSON. Ann Arbor, Michigan HQ (LLamasoft origin); now part of Coupa Software (San Mateo, California). LLamasoft founded 2000 by Don Hicks. Acquired by Coupa in 2020 for $130M. Coupa went private (Thomas Bravo $8B, 2023). Supply Chain Guru is the flagship network design product. Competes with Kinaxis, OMP, and River Logic for supply chain design.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription via Coupa
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription bundled with Coupa platform; standalone design modules
pricing.notes: Ann Arbor origin. Coupa subsidiary (Thomas Bravo private 2023). LLamasoft acquired 2020 $130M. Supply chain network design. Competes with Kinaxis and OMP for design optimization.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; optimization runs are long-running async jobs

known_agent_gotchas: STRATEGIC GOVERNANCE REQUIREMENT: Supply chain network design recommendations (facility open/close, supplier changes) have multi-year financial impact; automated optimization must not trigger execution without executive governance review and board approval

Model data quality dependency — supply chain optimization is sensitive to input data quality; inaccurate demand history, transportation costs, or lead times create misleading network design recommendations; validate all data inputs before optimization
Async optimization jobs — supply chain network optimization runs are long-running (minutes to hours for complex models); implement async job tracking and status polling, not synchronous API calls
Coupa acquisition integration risk — LLamasoft acquired by Coupa 2020, Coupa taken private by Thoma Bravo 2023; verify current API stability and LLamasoft product roadmap within Coupa ecosystem
No webhooks — optimization job completion requires polling; no native push notification for model run completion or network design results
Supply Chain Guru desktop legacy — LLamasoft Supply Chain Guru originated as a desktop application; cloud API capabilities may lag desktop functionality; validate API coverage for specific use case
agent_readiness.security_notes: Supply chain design. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2 via Coupa. US/EU. Supply chain network and cost data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Supply chain design. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Supply chain network and logistics data.
